headlines.description: — Brandon Ingram scored 30 points, including two key 3-pointers late, Scottie Barnes had 26 points and 13 assists, and the Toronto Raptors used a fast start to defeat the Indiana Pacers 115-101 on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ingram, Barnes spark fast start in Raptors' 115-101 win over Pacers

headlines.description: — Trey Murphy III scored 34 points, Saddiq Bey made a tying 3-pointer, converted an offensive rebound into a dunk and hit two free throws in the final 1:04, and the New Orleans Pelicans edged the Brooklyn Nets 116-113 on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Murphy's 34 points and Bey's clutch play push the Pelicans past the Nets, 116-113
